rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type scopes when they refer to component ports.
Use AGREE syntax with `assume`, `guarantee`, `eq`, `const`, and `assign` in valid annex blocks.
generic_rules: Generated AGREE expressions must preserve type consistency and use only visible identifiers.
Stateful equations should use initialized temporal recurrence with `pre(t)` and `->`.
Branching logic in AGREE should use nested `if ... then ... else` expressions.
Helper functions and equations should only reference defined or imported types and expressions.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Component type annexes are for interface-level assumptions/guarantees; implementation annexes for bindings.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type scopes.
Do not reference AADL property names like Period or Deadline as AGREE variables.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing attributes not exposed as typed ports or constants
Model fusion and architecture redesign during AGREE generation
